message:
feat(fcp-host): add MCP 2025 agent-facing protocol surface (agent_api.rs)

MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol types: McpInitializeRequest/Response,
McpToolListRequest/Response, McpToolCallRequest/Response,
McpResourceListRequest/Response with version negotiation (V2025_03,
V2024_11), McpContentBlock (text/image/resource), McpErrorCode (10 codes).

Agent session management: AgentSession with status tracking, activity
recording, expiry. McpMethodRouter for method→category dispatch.
ToolCallContext/ToolCallResult for execution tracking.
ToolDescriptor→McpToolListEntry conversion bridge.

Addresses oip0 acceptance criterion: "Agent API is MCP 2025 compatible
(SEP-1382 tool descriptors)".

158 new tests, fcp-host total: 1988 pass, 0 fail, all clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
